observed: ACTIVE_QUEUE.json remains a historical canonical snapshot.
M-004 established an owner-scoped effective-state resolver.
No deterministic repository inventory layer existed before this slice.
inferred: Queue-update chronology must be derived from retained provenance rather than filename order.
proposed: Repository discovery adapters should provide exact path, bytes, and immutable commit to the inventory module.
superseded: Reading additive queue records in filename or connector-return order.
unresolved: The connector does not expose a single paginated directory listing in this run.
Committed tests were not executed by an observable runtime in this run.
Structural acceptance does not prove deployment, test, runtime, or peer-run claims inside a record.

acceptance_behavior: requires parseable record with queue item identity and valid created_at
rejects duplicate path and duplicate record identity
orders by created_at, then commit, then path
feeds only accepted records into the M-004 effective-state resolver
retains explicit epistemic and privacy limits
privacy_boundary: Public repository paths, commit metadata, and abstract operational claims only. Raw private chat, health material, credentials, identifying personal data, and unreviewed uploads excluded.
